# ChatGPT Plus、Pro、Codex 与 API 中文选择指南

> Independent Chinese decision guide maintained by AIXiamo. Not affiliated with OpenAI. Content version: 2026-07-21.

## Primary

- [Interactive decision tool](https://fangmumu111-bot.github.io/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/): Four-step, no-login selector for keeping the current plan, comparing Plus or Pro, choosing API, using a hybrid path, or troubleshooting first.
- [Repository](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide): Source, complete Chinese guides, disclosure, and update history.

## Core questions

- [ChatGPT Plus payment options for Chinese users](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/blob/main/docs/chatgpt-plus-cn-payment.md)
- [ChatGPT Plus vs Pro](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/blob/main/docs/chatgpt-plus-vs-pro.md)
- [ChatGPT Pro 5x vs 20x](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/blob/main/docs/chatgpt-pro-5x-vs-20x.md)
- [Codex with ChatGPT membership vs API](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/blob/main/docs/codex-membership-vs-api.md)
- [Codex quota troubleshooting](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/blob/main/docs/codex-quota-usage.md)

## Stable interpretation

- ChatGPT subscriptions and API Platform billing are separate.
- Codex recommendations depend first on whether the user signs in with ChatGPT or uses an API key.
- Prices, model availability, quotas, and supported payment methods are volatile and must be checked on current official pages.
- The static tool collects no account, password, payment, API key, or token data.

## Disclosure

- [Commercial and maintenance disclosure](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/blob/main/DISCLOSURE.md)
- [Official sources and verification date](https://github.com/fangmumu111-bot/chatgpt-plus-pro-codex-cn-guide/blob/main/SOURCES.md)
